name: GetBalance
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific balance by its ID. Shows the balance's currency, status, available amount (funds ready to use), pending amount (funds being processed), transfer threshold, and creation date. Use this to check specific currency balance details.

balance_id.description: The ID of the balance to retrieve (e.g., 'bal_abc123').

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to 'true' to retrieve a test mode balance, or omit for live mode.
